interact with any of the following functions of  'nofeeswap' and 'nofeeswapDelegatee', an account must first invoke 'INofeeswap.unlock(unlockTarget, data)' to unlock the protocol:   'INofeeswap.clear(Tag,uint256)'   'INofeeswap.take(address,address,uint256)'   'INofeeswap.take(address,uint256,address,uint256)'   'INofeeswap.take(address,uint256,address,uint256,bytes)'   'INofeeswap.settle(address)'   'INofeeswap.transferTransientBalanceFrom(address,address,Tag,uint256)'   'INofeeswap.modifyBalance(address,Tag,int256)'   'INofeeswap.modifyBalance(address,Tag,Tag,int256,int256)'   'INofeeswap.swap(uint256,int256,X59,uint256,bytes)'   'INofeeswapDelegatee.modifyPosition(uint256,X59,X59,int256,bytes)'   'INofeeswapDelegatee.donate(uint256,uint256,bytes)' The function 'INofeeswap.unlock' invokes 'IUnlockCallback(unlockTarget).unlockCallback(caller, data)' through which any account may interact with the above methods. The default target which implements 'unlockCallback' is 'Operator.sol' for which a sequence of instructions should be encoded as 'data'. All transient balances must be settled within 'unlockCallback' for the 'INofeeswap.unlock(unlockTarget, data)' call to not revert. In other words, all balances in transient storage for all accounts should net to zero so that 'INofeeswap.unlock(unlockTarget, data)' does not revert."},"weth9()":{"notice":"weth9 contract P9nuj7annUCNnuC3y8MJ6ZgP4jnRF2DF"]},"contracts/core/contracts/utilities/X59.sol":{"keccak256":"0xce3f9b46206c5573e7538e07f73faef41568238b49ea9210de42a6eec67a72a9","urls":["bzz-raw://301a653c2683a3c888ab3d430e26f76f552c869f4453850f75892f289d80f2eb","dweb:/ipfs/QmXa8MdDDvJmRD2Mw1nnJGLf92JaG7uSjMxHtAsMnw1Uyv"]},"contracts/core/contracts/utilities/X74.sol":{"keccak256":"0x2945fe87dcae02ce66e3827bbc6daa47d8bec487fff1b8329f9696011fa2c761","urls":["bzz-raw://921a3a36dfe4f9c539eefc09fcb62186b84d8625f1c2537658f07c5057606903","dweb:/ipfs/QmcjiuVVzMkG138mxmkydE5261k74uvU1u1HyLA87d9DG8"]},"contracts/operator/contracts/Operator.sol":{"keccak256":"0x36169674854effb1afbeb83acaf2690e947972c8d1d994d6131a2d9b40c7759d","urls":["bzz-raw://d331c3d4f73b62082746e57351eafd0e9879790ee5e2631859d3e444ebee2820","dweb:/ipfs/QmVG2JX4HJeqGrM25nG3fR7mDnitcy2B1a8yVZTZdpWcrN"]},"contracts/operator/contracts/interfaces/IOperator.sol":{"keccak256":"0x1851e2565cb2ca6a17c56e48c80f0c875c7887120ac9df3bca8d0cc7dfd92046","urls":["bzz-raw://892ab3793dbe8e450755dfba608d06d89ca31e169a67ade29a1656a0a2574bf9","dweb:/ipfs/QmZAgbDAGkgWb9QGjSY25fgTwaZvegorwEnZVyZY15N59N"]}},"version":1}

returns._0: The value of the slot as bytes32

params.nSlots: Number of slots to be read.

params.slots: List of slots to tload from.

params.caller: The 'caller' of the protocol's 'INofeeswap.unlock(unlockTarget, data)' method.
params.data: The input data that was passed to the protocol's 'INofeeswap.unlock(unlockTarget, data)' method as input.

returns.returnData: The output that should be returned to the 'caller'.

transientAccess(bytes32).notice: Provides access to a single Nofeeswap transient storage slot.

transientAccess(bytes32,uint256).notice: Provides access to consecutive Nofeeswap transient storage slots.

transientAccess(bytes32[]).notice: Provides access to a given list of Nofeeswap transient storage slots.

unlockCallback(address,bytes).notice: In order to interact with any of the following functions of  'nofeeswap' and 'nofeeswapDelegatee', an account must first invoke 'INofeeswap.unlock(unlockTarget, data)' to unlock the protocol:   'INofeeswap.clear(Tag,uint256)'   'INofeeswap.take(address,address,uint256)'   'INofeeswap.take(address,uint256,address,uint256)'   'INofeeswap.take(address,uint256,address,uint256,bytes)'   'INofeeswap.settle(address)'   'INofeeswap.transferTransientBalanceFrom(address,address,Tag,uint256)'   'INofeeswap.modifyBalance(address,Tag,int256)'   'INofeeswap.modifyBalance(address,Tag,Tag,int256,int256)'   'INofeeswap.swap(uint256,int256,X59,uint256,bytes)'   'INofeeswapDelegatee.modifyPosition(uint256,X59,X59,int256,bytes)'   'INofeeswapDelegatee.donate(uint256,uint256,bytes)' The function 'INofeeswap.unlock' invokes 'IUnlockCallback(unlockTarget).unlockCallback(caller, data)' through which any account may interact with the above methods. The default target which implements 'unlockCallback' is 'Operator.sol' for which a sequence of instructions should be encoded as 'data'. All transient balances must be settled within 'unlockCallback' for the 'INofeeswap.unlock(unlockTarget, data)' call to not revert. In other words, all balances in transient storage for all accounts should net to zero so that 'INofeeswap.unlock(unlockTarget, data)' does not revert.
